{{Quote|According to the priest, the gems are ''living entities''… Life forms from another part of the cosmos swept here by the cataclysm that created the Red Nebula. They're ''mates'' of sorts. As long as they are ''together'', they radiate a sense of well being, a positive ''physical aura''—an aura that can affect their ''surroundings''. Separated, their well being turns to ''anguish'' and the aura turns ''negative'', radiating stronger… ''growing''…|[[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]]|<ref name="SW50" />}}
The '''Great Life Jewels''' were a pair of [[Gemstone/Legends|gems]] that appeared in the [[Red Nebula/Legends|Red Nebula]] after the [[Awesome cataclysm|cataclysm]] that separated it from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Together, they had the power to preserve life within their proximity; however, once separated, they carried a [[Death/Legends|fatal]] [[Disease/Legends|disease]] known as the [[Crimson Forever]].
